author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Observation: Found root cause of attn_qkv gradient break. contiguous_t() at methods.rs:502-510 creates a new tensor via data_vec() + from_storage WITHOUT attaching a backward node. When permute() returns a non-contiguous strided view with PermuteBackward grad_fn, calling .contiguous() copies the data but severs the autograd chain. The new tensor has requires_grad=true but no grad_fn, so backward cannot reach the original permuted tensor or anything before it. Fix: add a ContiguousBackward that reshapes the gradient back (identity, since contiguous is just a data rearrangement — the gradient is the same shape).
